title: Berry Chia Seed Breakfast
description: A creamy make-ahead berry breakfast with banana, chia, hemp, flaxseed, and fresh morning toppings.

ingredients.item: plain yogurt or unsweetened almond milk

steps: Blend the frozen banana, frozen blueberries and strawberries, and yogurt or almond milk until smooth, adding water as needed.
Taste and add stevia, another sugar substitute, or honey if desired.
Stir in the chia seeds, hemp seeds, ground flaxseed, and chopped almonds.
Transfer to a covered jar or bowl and refrigerate overnight.
In the morning, top with fresh blueberries, sliced banana, and optional granola just before eating.
notes: Keep the granola separate overnight so it remains crunchy.
Use almond milk and a plant-based sweetener for a fully plant-based version.
